data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Bulk distribution to employee groups', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for bulk distribution, yet there is no supporting evidence demonstrating that this feature exists or operates as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of functionality for bulk distribution to employee groups.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for bulk distribution functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence or endpoint calls that verify the bulk distribution feature.
